# Sourcery Documentation

> Build and run schema-first extraction pipelines with Sourcery.

Sourcery is a schema-first extraction framework for converting unstructured text, files, and URLs into typed, grounded entities with traceability and reviewable output.


## Getting Started

- [Home](https://jolovicdev.github.io/sourcery/index.md): Documentation home and platform overview.
- [Installation](https://jolovicdev.github.io/sourcery/getting-started/installation/index.md): Installation, optional extras, and environment setup.
- [Quickstart](https://jolovicdev.github.io/sourcery/getting-started/quickstart/index.md): End-to-end quickstart with JSONL and HTML outputs.

## Guides

- [Build A Pipeline](https://jolovicdev.github.io/sourcery/guides/build-a-pipeline/index.md): Mixed-source extraction pipeline workflow.
- [Code Examples](https://jolovicdev.github.io/sourcery/guides/code-examples/index.md): Runnable API examples for extraction, ingestion, IO, and benchmarking.
- [Usage](https://jolovicdev.github.io/sourcery/guides/usage/index.md): End-to-end usage reference and API patterns.
- [Runtime And Tuning](https://jolovicdev.github.io/sourcery/guides/runtime-and-tuning/index.md): Runtime controls, retries, and tuning profiles.
- [Ingestion](https://jolovicdev.github.io/sourcery/guides/ingestion/index.md): Source loading and ingestion behavior.
- [Outputs And Reviewer](https://jolovicdev.github.io/sourcery/guides/outputs-and-reviewer/index.md): JSONL persistence and reviewer workflows.
- [Benchmarking](https://jolovicdev.github.io/sourcery/guides/benchmarking/index.md): Benchmark CLI usage and output format.
- [Testing And Validation](https://jolovicdev.github.io/sourcery/guides/testing-and-validation/index.md): Test, lint, and type-check commands.

## Architecture

- [System Overview](https://jolovicdev.github.io/sourcery/architecture/system-overview/index.md): Module boundaries and execution flow.
- [Pipeline Internals](https://jolovicdev.github.io/sourcery/architecture/pipeline-internals/index.md): Chunking, alignment, merge, and prompt internals.
- [Runtime Internals](https://jolovicdev.github.io/sourcery/architecture/runtime-internals/index.md): Engine/runtime orchestration internals.

## Reference

- [Public API](https://jolovicdev.github.io/sourcery/reference/public-api/index.md): Public exports and top-level API surface.
- [Data Contracts](https://jolovicdev.github.io/sourcery/reference/data-contracts/index.md): Pydantic contract and schema model reference.
- [Error Model](https://jolovicdev.github.io/sourcery/reference/error-model/index.md): Exception hierarchy and error handling model.
- [File-by-File Map](https://jolovicdev.github.io/sourcery/reference/file-by-file-map/index.md): File-level responsibilities across modules.
